name: Gai Dom Kha (Thai Chicken Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. The red chilies are also known as "prik khee nu".
2. Wash lemon grass and trim root ends and tough layers.
3. Peel the bottom 6 inches of lemon grass thinly.
4. Chop 1 tbsp of the peeled lemon grass.
5. Puree chopped lemon grass, ginger slices, garlic, peppercorns, coriander roots, shallots, and 1 tbsp of ginger in a blender.
6. Bring 1 cup of coconut milk to boil in a large pot.
7. Add the pureed mixture to the boiling coconut milk.
8. Stir in the remaining chicken pieces, rest of the coconut milk, chopped ginger slices, and lemon grass.
9. Return the chicken to the pot and bring back to a boil.
10. Reduce heat to medium and simmer uncovered until the chicken is tender.
11. Season with minced chilies, fish sauce, and lime juice.
12. Serve the soup garnished with kaffir lime leaves and coriander sprigs.
